settings.corePathPlaceholder: Leave empty for system default path

settings.checkUpdateUpToDate: You are on the latest version: {{version}}
settings.autoRestartGatewayDesc: Applied to non-daemon mode; auto-restarts on crash.
settings.installDaemonDesc: Register OpenClaw as a system service. When enabled, the core runs automatically on system startup and remains active even if the Launcher is closed.
settings.unrestrictedModeDesc: Removes some safety restrictions, allowing the Agent to perform higher-risk operations. Use with caution.
settings.noModelsFromAuth: No models retrieved from current auth status.
settings.modelNotInAuthScope: Model not in authorized provider scope

diag.title: Quick Diagnostics

auth.oauthGuide: No key required. Clicking "Add Authorization" will automatically start the browser OAuth flow.
auth.localServiceGuide: Add this local service directly; no API key needed.
auth.restoreSaved: Click to restore to saved value: {{val}}

gateway.portHelp: Writes to gateway.port in openclaw.json; Gateway uses this port on startup. Leave empty for default (18789).

errors.missingCorePath: Error: Core Path not set. Please fill in the absolute path to OpenClaw core in "Edit Config" and try again.

errors.corePathNotExist: Error: Core Path directory does not exist: {{path}}

errors.portNotListen: Target port did not enter LISTEN state
errors.portKillFailed: Unable to close processes occupying Port {{port}}
errors.portKillError: Error occurred while closing processes related to Port {{port}}

warnings.missingConfigPath: Warning: Config Path not set. Gateway will use default ~/.openclaw settings. Running multiple OpenClaw instances simultaneously may cause conflicts. It's recommended to specify Config Path in "Launcher Settings".

logs.portKilled: Processes related to Port {{port}} have been closed (PIDs: {{pids}})
logs.watchdogEnabled: External Terminal mode Gateway watchdog enabled (HTTP health check + auto-restart)
logs.watchdogDisabled: External Terminal mode watchdog disabled (as configured)
logs.portForceKilled: Forcibly closed processes related to Port {{port}} (PIDs: {{pids}}){{suffix}}

welcome.title: Welcome to Openclaw
welcome.subtitle: Before infusing a soul into the lobster, please tell us your situation:
welcome.existingDesc: I already have a working OpenClaw environment, now passing it to a more advanced mecha wrapper.
welcome.newDesc: This is my first time. Please guide me through a brand new setup and create my first lobster soul.
welcome.architectureDesc: The system will precisely manage your core, config, and workspace through 'Tri-Zone' architecture.

steps.installing: Installing superpower dependencies for the lobster...
steps.success: Congratulations! Your OpenClaw soul is infused.

Your OpenClaw Commander is online.
You can now enter the dashboard to collaborate with your AI.

modelSelect.c35Desc: Top-tier coding and logic, highly recommended.
modelSelect.gpt4oDesc: Strong overall performance, fast, comprehensive ecosystem.
modelSelect.keyHelper: Key is encrypted and stored locally. Leave empty if using local/custom models.
modelSelect.c37Desc: 最強混合推論，程式與邏輯推薦首選。
modelSelect.deepseekDesc: 超高性價比，適合大規模自動化任務。
modelSelect.geminiDesc: 極速多模態，支援長文本脈絡處理。
modelSelect.ollamaDesc: 本地運行，數據不出門。需搭配 Ollama 環境。
modelSelect.vllmDesc: 對接自定義推論後端或兼容轉發服務。
modelSelect.authHealthWarning: 偵測到授權風險：critical {{critical}} / warn {{warn}}。建議先到 Settings > 授權管理修復後再啟動。
modelSelect.pathRequiredError: 請先完成三區路徑設定（Core / Config / Workspace）後再進行模型授權。
modelSelect.tokenCommandRequired: 請先輸入要執行的指令
modelSelect.authorizeSoulCore: 向靈魂核心授權 (Authorize Soul Core)
modelSelect.tokenCommandTitle: CLI 指令（直接取得 Token）
modelSelect.tokenCommandHint: 步驟：① 點擊「執行指令」開啟終端機 → ② 在終端機依指示完成授權 → ③ 複製輸出的 Token → ④ 貼到上方「API 密鑰」欄位後按授權。
modelSelect.noApiKeyNeeded: ✓ 此授權模式無須輸入 API 密鑰。按下授權後將會進行對應的驗證流程（如自動開啟瀏覽器或本地服務）。
modelSelect.vllmModelHint: ⚠️ 預設模型名稱僅為範例（vllm/mistral-7b），請至「設定 → 模型」頁面修改為實際部署的模型名稱。
modelSelect.oauthRetryHint: If OAuth is canceled or fails midway, click the button below to restart authorization.

daemon.title: Background Gateway Service
daemon.desc: Disabled by default. When off, both OAuth and non-OAuth onboarding explicitly skip daemon installation so no macOS launchd service is written.
daemon.disabled: Background service will not be installed

skillManager.title: Skill Plugin Matrix
skillManager.securityDesc: Core skills are system-protected and cannot be disabled. Workspace skills are dynamically loaded from your configuration directory and governed by OpenClaw ACL command permissions.

guide.core: The following skills are system-level, persistent, and cannot be disabled, ensuring AI core stability.
guide.workspace: The following skills are dynamically mounted from the <0>skills/</0> directory in your workspace and can be enabled/disabled.

status.loadCoreError: Failed to get core skills, please try rescanning.
status.emptyWorkspace: No extension skills installed in current workspace. Place skill folders into your workspace's <0>skills/</0> directory, then click the refresh icon on the top right to mount.
status.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the skill "{{name}}"? This will delete the folder in the workspace and cannot be undone.
status.moveCoreConfirm: Move system skill "{{name}}" into the workspace skills directory? After moving, it will no longer stay in the core skills directory.
status.moveCoreError: Failed to move system skill. Please try again later.
status.moveToCoreConfirm: Move workspace skill "{{name}}" into the core skills directory?
status.moveToCoreError: Failed to move workspace skill to core. Please try again later.
status.deleteCoreConfirm: ⚠️ Permanently delete core skill "{{name}}"? This removes it from the Core directory and cannot be undone.
status.deleteCoreError: Failed to delete core skill. Please try again later.
status.coreUnlocked: Unlocked — click to delete this core skill
status.coreUnlockedWarning: ⚠️ Core unlock mode: the lock icon on each card will permanently delete the skill. This cannot be undone — proceed carefully.
status.electronUnavailable: electronAPI unavailable, please ensure the Electron environment is started correctly.
status.parseError: Failed to parse skill data, please try again.
status.systemRequired: System core feature, cannot be deleted

browser.desc: Control browser to execute web operations

coding.desc: Invoke Claude Code for software development
coding.details: Deeply integrated with script generation and Git auto-commit.

search.desc: Full-web search using the Brave API
search.details: Requires BRAVE_API_KEY configuration to enable real-time search.

market.desc: Monitor brand & product PR risk signals
market.details: Periodically crawls social media and news for sentiment analysis.

cron.details: Manages Moltbot's periodic custom task execution.

providerBreakdown.title: Provider Distribution

setupMessaging.title: Bond Your Communication Channel
setupMessaging.subtitle: OpenClaw needs an encrypted channel to establish telepathy with you
setupMessaging.subtitleLocked: "Mecha communication module ready, awaiting final command..."
setupMessaging.noTokenNeeded: ✓ This channel does not require a Token here. You can complete the connection by scanning the QR Code later.

postSetupHint.irc: ⚠️ IRC requires additional server / port / nick / channel settings in openclaw.json. The Token field can be left blank. Please complete the setup on the 'Runtime Config' page later.
postSetupHint.signal: ⚠️ Signal requires prior phone number registration via signal-cli (signal-cli register / verify) before OpenClaw can connect. The Token field can be left blank. Follow signal-cli instructions later.
postSetupHint.imessage: ⚠️ iMessage support is experimental, only available on macOS, and requires access to the 'Messages' App in System Preferences. The Token field can be left blank. Follow CLI instructions later.

telegram.desc: Bot API, most recommended encrypted channel

whatsapp.placeholder: No input needed, scan QR Code later

irc.desc: Connect to traditional IRC server domain

slack.appTokenHint: Socket Mode requires both Bot Token and App-Level Token (xapp-). Generate at Slack App Settings → Socket Mode.

signal.placeholder: Signal REST API URL or leave blank

guide.howToGetTelegram: How to get a Telegram Token?
guide.step2Suffix: and follow instructions to name your Lobster (must end in _bot).
guide.step3: Once complete, BotFather will give you an API Token. Keep it safe and never share it.
guide.tip: Tip: This bot will become your exclusive encrypted channel with OpenClaw, where all analysis reports will be sent.
guide.confirm: Got it, let's go fill it in

setupSkills.title: Expand Your Lobster Superpowers
setupSkills.subtitle: Select the extra skills you want to install from ClawHub{{detected}}.

manager.title: Empower Your Lobster with Super Skills
manager.subtitle: Manage installed skills here: rescan, import, or remove. Toggle ability switches in the dashboard Skill Manager.
manager.coreEmpty: No core skills detected yet. Try rescanning.
manager.emptyDesc: Import skills first, or make sure a skills directory exists under Workspace or Config path, then rescan.
manager.errorParse: Failed to parse skill data. Please try again later.
manager.errorMissingBaseDir: Workspace or config path is not set yet. Please finish initialization first.

telegram.title: Telegram Channel Plugin
telegram.desc: OpenClaw's most recommended channel — full privacy chat & command interaction support.

discord.title: Discord Channel Plugin
discord.desc: Join a Discord server with multi-channel collaboration and complex permission management.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Channel Plugin
whatsapp.desc: Integrate a WhatsApp Business account so your AI replies directly in your chat app.

obsidian.title: Obsidian Knowledge Base
obsidian.desc: Sync your Obsidian notes so the AI has a persistent second-brain memory.

notion.title: Notion Coordinator
notion.desc: Auto-organize tasks and update pages with deep Notion project integration.

maps.title: Google Maps Navigator
maps.desc: Search locations, check opening hours and traffic — your all-in-one life assistant.

errors.setupTokenMissing: Setup-Token missing; please paste token from claude setup-token.
errors.configPathMissingForVerification: Missing Config Path, cannot verify auth persistence.
errors.unsupportedChannelDeep: OpenClaw currently does not support channel: {{id}}. Verify Core Path points to a valid OpenClaw (Current: {{path}}), then run pnpm openclaw channels add --help to check support. If not listed, your version doesn't support it.

memory.selectFile: Select a file to view its content
memory.selectFileHint: Click on a memory or data file in the left panel
memory.noWorkspaceHint: Please complete path setup in Launcher Config or onboarding
memory.binaryFile: Binary file — cannot display as text
memory.binaryFileHint: This file appears to be in a binary format. Forcing text mode may show garbled content.
memory.unknownFormatHint: Unrecognized file format — attempting to display as plain text. Content may not render correctly.

groupHints.memory: Stores the agent's long-term memory, conversation context, or specific knowledge.
groupHints.memoryDaily: Auto-generated daily memory logs, named by date, recording daily operations and key events.
groupHints.bootstrap: Initialization settings and predefined behavioral norms at startup.
groupHints.agents: Workspace bootstrap document - defines session startup rules and how the agent should orient itself.
groupHints.soul: Stores the agent's core logic or highly sensitive configurations.
groupHints.identity: Defines the agent's role, personality, permission level, and other identity features.
groupHints.tools: Lists all tools accessible to the agent, defining its capabilities and functional scope.
groupHints.heartbeat: System heartbeat records and operation audit history.
groupHints.documents: Various descriptive documents, contracts, or specifications related to the project.
groupHints.assets: Images, videos, audio, and other static multimedia files.
groupHints.context: Reference materials used to extend AI background knowledge or domain knowledge.
groupHints.models: Trained model files, weights, or related parameters.
groupHints.scripts: Project-specific processing scripts and automation code snippets.
groupHints.data: Various raw data, balance sheets, or large structured data.

errors.encodingFailed: Encoding conversion failed, showing raw content

uninstall.title: Uninstall OpenClaw
uninstall.dangerDesc: Remove all OpenClaw files, configuration, and workspace data. This cannot be undone.
uninstall.warningDesc: All data listed below will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
uninstall.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone. Please back up any important data before proceeding.
uninstall.confirmDesc: Please check the box below to confirm before uninstalling.
uninstall.confirmCheck: I understand this will permanently delete all OpenClaw data and cannot be undone.
uninstall.runningFailed: An error occurred during uninstall. Please check the log above.
uninstall.doneDesc: OpenClaw has been successfully removed. ClawLaunch is still running — you can reinstall OpenClaw or continue using ClawLaunch.
